response.justification: Bogdan is a strong generalist engineer with roughly 16 years of hands-on experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, and his founding of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial instinct. However, this role is a director-level IC position that requires deep, demonstrated AI expertise — specifically recognized leadership in building AI-powered products or platforms at scale — and Bogdan's AI involvement is limited to a few weeks at his current role doing MCP tooling. There is no cloud platform strategy experience, no history of advising strategic customers or partners on AI adoption, no Master's or PhD in an AI-adjacent field, and no evidence of the kind of technical thought leadership (publications, influential platforms, strategic influence) that a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy would be expected to carry.
strengths: ~16 years of broad, polyglot engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure — meets the minimum tenure bar
Demonstrated entrepreneurial streak: founded GISCollective and has sustained it as an open-source platform, signaling builder mentality
Active knowledge sharer through conference talks, full-day workshops, and open-source library authorship — relevant to the 'inspire others' responsibility
concerns: AI expertise is surface-level and very recent — limited to a few months of MCP tooling work at the current role, with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale
No cloud platform strategy experience; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is operational IaC, not platform-level cloud architecture or strategic advisory
No indication of director-level scope: advising strategic customers, influencing executive product direction, or cross-organizational technical leadership

key_factors.factor: No strategic or advisory leadership track record
Long polyglot engineering tenure with entrepreneurial experience
